description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two stages, build and deploy, using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. In the build stage add a job named build that runs the commands docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE . and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE to authenticate, build and push the image to the GitLab Container Registry. In the deploy stage add a job named deploy that executes curl -X POST -data=\"\" https://deliverous.com/api/v1/trigger/$DELIVEROUS_TRIGGER to trigger a Deliverous deployment via its API. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, and the deploy job uses the $DELIVEROUS_TRIGGER secret variable.
